title: Dysfunctional's PvP Resource Pack
description: A simple and effective 1.8.9 PvP pack with 1.14+ textures with some useful tweaks and fixes.
body:
# Dysfunctional's PvP Resource Pack

Dysfunctional's PvP Resource Pack is a 1.8.9 pvp pack with updated textures and some fixes with pvp centric tweaks like short swords and saturated block textures.

# Credits:
Edited, Updated, and Created By Hexangle

HexanglesHypixelPack is licnsed under "GNU General Public License v3.0"

Extra Textures And Fixes Made By [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)

I am not accociated with Microsoft/Mojang and all 1.14+ assets are owned by [Mojang](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us)

# Apex Hosting:
The best way to support our small teams projects is to purchase a server from [ApexHosting.](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=8139)
